content.boundary: Applies to public statutory admission structure for 6-/8-year tracks nationally; explicitly excludes higher-education admission and vocational-track curriculum content, per task scope; church/private-maintainer negotiation included as a governance dependency.
content.change_lever: Statutory amendment to Act CXC of 2011 restructuring grade entry points for gimnázium admission, shifting the 6-/8-year tracks toward a unified lower-secondary comprehensive phase followed by later selection.
content.name: Delay selection age to 14-16 (Polish/Finnish-style comprehensive extension)
content.system_problem: Hungary tracks at age 10-13 versus OECD average of 15; cross-national evidence shows early tracking widens social achievement gaps (d=0.44) and Hungary has the highest between-school variance among OECD countries (71% vs 36%).
